response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song title '愛♡スクリ〜ム!' from on-screen text. The artist 'AiScReam' was determined via the video's credits. Performed a combined search query: '\"愛♡スクリ〜ム！\" Japanese and English lyrics'. Retrieved lyrics from Genius and other music sites to populate the JSON. The video structure consists of an intro dialogue followed by a full song performance.
response.global_summary: The video begins with two VTubers, Pavolia Reine and another, engaging in dialogue in a studio setting. This is followed by a choreographed performance of the song 'Ai♡Scream!' by a trio of VTubers: Pavolia Reine, Kobo Kanaeru, and Kureiji Ollie.

scenes.description: Dialogue segment featuring two VTubers discussing a past 3D performance.
Performance of the song 'Ai♡Scream!' by VTubers Pavolia Reine, Kobo Kanaeru, and Kureiji Ollie. The song title and credits appear on-screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Pavolia Reine, Kobo Kanaeru, Kureiji Ollie
